data.title: Tesla Dojo Fabric Lead Leaves Company Amid Major Talent Upheaval At EV Giant
data.description: Eric Quinnell, senior staff engineer at Tesla, who was working on the company's Dojo supercomputer project, said on Friday that he is leaving the EV giant.
